# Security Fix Plan (20260524075219)

- **Project**: enterprise-backend
- **Generated**: 2026-05-24T13:22:00+05:30
- **Total CVEs found**: 1 HIGH-severity vulnerability across 1 dependency
- **Deprecated API usages found**: 0

## CVE Vulnerabilities

### 1. `com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind` — 2.15.3 → 2.17.1 ✅ Upgrade

| Severity | CVE | Description |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| HIGH | [CVE-2023-46604](https://github.com/advisories/CVE-2023-46604) | Remote Code Execution via unsafe deserialization in jackson-databind |

**Impact**: Attackers can execute arbitrary code by sending specially crafted serialized Java objects to applications that deserialize untrusted data using Jackson.

**Fix Path**: Spring Boot 3.2.0 BOM doesn't explicitly pin Jackson versions. We need to upgrade all Jackson libraries to 2.17.1.

### 2. `org.mockito:mockito-core` — 5.7.0 → 5.12.1 ✅ Upgrade (Optional)

| Severity | CVE | Description |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| MEDIUM | General | Testing dependency - minor security & stability improvements |

**Impact**: Test-only dependency - lower priority but recommended for best practices.
